name: manage-eight-sleep-skill
description: Guarded Eight Sleep Skill and CLI for sleep reads and temporary Pod temperature control.

scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-repository.mjs && node scripts/check-secrets.mjs && node --check skills/manage-eight-sleep/scripts/eight-sleep-lib.mjs && node --check skills/manage-eight-sleep/scripts/eight-sleep.mjs && node skills/manage-eight-sleep/scripts/eight-sleep.mjs help > /dev/null && bash -n install.sh
